block_03: Strike Competitors in the Bullseye with Trading!
block_12: IQ Option has become the main sponsor of the biggest esports event of 2021 — CS:GO Latin America Cup! You can win cash prizes too by taking part in the Ultimate Strike Tournament dedicated to the CS:GO competition!
block_18: Each participant gets a special $10,000 tournament balance with virtual funds to trade. The tournament will last only for three days, during which an enormous prize pool worth $50,000 will be distributed among the 30 best traders on the leaderboard! So don’t waste your time, and start preparing for the trading battle right away!
